items_type_payload_rule.name: items_type_payload_rule
items_type_payload_rule.value:
(
        ("items"."type" = 'message' and "items"."role" is not null and "items"."content" is not null) or
        ("items"."type" = 'function_call' and "items"."call_id" is not null and "items"."name" is not null and "items"."arguments" is not null) or
        ("items"."type" = 'function_call_output' and "items"."call_id" is not null and "items"."output" is not null) or
        ("items"."type" = 'reasoning' and "items"."summary" is not null and "items"."role" is null)
      )

runs_root_run_rule.name: runs_root_run_rule
runs_root_run_rule.value: (("runs"."parent_run_id" is null and "runs"."root_run_id" = "runs"."id") or ("runs"."parent_run_id" is not null and "runs"."root_run_id" <> "runs"."id"))

wait_entries_agent_target_rule.name: wait_entries_agent_target_rule
wait_entries_agent_target_rule.value: (("wait_entries"."type" = 'agent' and "wait_entries"."target_kind" = 'run' and "wait_entries"."target_run_id" is not null) or ("wait_entries"."type" <> 'agent' and "wait_entries"."target_run_id" is null))
